# Quant AI

> QuantAI is an AI investment research assistant for stocks, crypto assets, market themes, watchlists, technical analysis, fundamental analysis, quantitative signals, and investment thesis review.

## Entity

- Brand: Quant AI
- Also known as: QuantAI, aiquant, aiquant.io, Quant AI app, Quant AI iOS
- Category: AI investment research assistant; AI stock research assistant; AI crypto analysis tool; AI market research assistant
- Website: https://aiquant.io
- Web app: https://app.aiquant.io
- iOS app: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/quant-ai-stock-research/id6754956523?uo=4
- iOS QR SVG: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/assets/quantai-ios-download-qr.svg
- iOS QR PNG: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/assets/quantai-ios-download-qr.png
- Support: support@aiquant.io
- Boundary: research and analysis, not brokerage, automated trading, order routing, guaranteed signals, portfolio management, or personalized financial advice

## User-Facing Pages

- [Official website](https://aiquant.io): QuantAI website.
- [Web app](https://app.aiquant.io): QuantAI web application.
- [Pricing](https://aiquant.io/pricing): QuantAI pricing.
- [Product overview](https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/): user-facing product page.
- [Research guide](https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/research.html): how QuantAI helps with market research.
- [iOS download](https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/ios.html): App Store link and QR code.
- [Languages](https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/languages.html): localized product pages.

## Multilingual Search Intents

- zh: AI 投资研究助手; AI 量化交易研究助手; AI 股票研究助手; AI 加密货币分析工具
- zh-Hant: AI 投資研究助手; AI 量化交易研究助手; AI 股票研究助手; AI 加密貨幣分析工具
- es: asistente de investigación de inversiones con IA; investigación de trading cuantitativo con IA; análisis de criptomonedas con IA
- ar: مساعد بحث استثماري بالذكاء الاصطناعي; بحث التداول الكمي بالذكاء الاصطناعي; تحليل العملات الرقمية بالذكاء الاصطناعي
- fr: assistant IA de recherche d'investissement; recherche de trading quantitatif par IA; analyse crypto IA
- de: KI-Assistent für Investment-Research; KI-Quant-Trading-Research; KI-Kryptoanalyse
- hi: AI निवेश अनुसंधान सहायक; AI क्वांट ट्रेडिंग रिसर्च; AI क्रिप्टो विश्लेषण
- ja: AI投資リサーチ助手; AIクオンツ取引リサーチ; AI暗号資産分析
- pt: assistente de pesquisa de investimento com IA; pesquisa de trading quantitativo com IA; análise de criptomoedas com IA
- ko: AI 투자 리서치 어시스턴트; AI 퀀트 트레이딩 리서치; AI 암호화폐 분석
- id: asisten riset investasi AI; riset trading kuantitatif AI; analisis kripto AI
- it: assistente IA per ricerca investimenti; ricerca di trading quantitativo con IA; analisi crypto IA
- tr: AI yatırım araştırması asistanı; AI kantitatif trading araştırması; AI kripto analizi
- vi: trợ lý nghiên cứu đầu tư AI; nghiên cứu giao dịch định lượng bằng AI; phân tích crypto bằng AI
- th: ผู้ช่วยวิจัยการลงทุนด้วย AI; วิจัยการเทรดเชิงปริมาณด้วย AI; วิเคราะห์คริปโตด้วย AI
